name: IdsEdwMbrRdsDSetCurrentNExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_in AS (SELECT MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_SK,MBR_RDS_D.SRC_SYS_CD,MBR_RDS_D.MBR_UNIQ_KEY,MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_SUBMT_DT_SK,MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_PLN_YR_STRT_DT_SK,MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_PERD_EFF_DT_SK,MBR_RDS_D.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,MBR_RDS_D.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,MBR_RDS_D.GRP_SK,MBR_RDS_D.MBR_SK,MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_PLN_YR_END_DT_SK,MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_PERD_TERM_DT_SK,MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_PLN_YR_CUR_RCRD_IN,MBR_RDS_D.GRP_ID,MBR_RDS_D.GRP_NM,MBR_RDS_D.MBR_ID,MBR_RDS_D.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,MBR_RDS_D.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_RDS_D MBR_RDS_D WHERE MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_PLN_YR_CUR_RCRD_IN= 'Y' AND MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_SK <> 1 AND MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_SK <> 0 AND MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_SUBMT_DT_SK <> (SELECT MAX(MBR_RDS_D2.MBR_RDS_SUBMT_DT_SK) FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_RDS_D MBR_RDS_D2 WHERE MBR_RDS_D2.SRC_SYS_CD=MBR_RDS_D.SRC_SYS_CD AND MBR_RDS_D2.GRP_SK=MBR_RDS_D.GRP_SK AND MBR_RDS_D2.MBR_RDS_PLN_YR_STRT_DT_SK=MBR_RDS_D.MBR_RDS_PLN_YR_STRT_DT_SK)) SELECT cte_in.MBR_RDS_SK,cte_in.SRC_SYS_CD,cte_in.MBR_UNIQ_KEY,cte_in.MBR_RDS_SUBMT_DT_SK,cte_in.MBR_RDS_PLN_YR_STRT_DT_SK,cte_in.MBR_RDS_PERD_EFF_DT_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,cte_in.GRP_SK,cte_in.MBR_SK,cte_in.MBR_RDS_PLN_YR_END_DT_SK,cte_in.MBR_RDS_PERD_TERM_DT_SK,'N' as MBR_RDS_PLN_YR_CUR_RCRD_IN,cte_in.GRP_ID,cte_in.GRP_NM,cte_in.MBR_ID,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_in

Annotations:
Job name: IdsEdwMbrRdsDSetCurrentNExtr


Job Extract data from IDS table and apply Fkey and Code denormalization, create a load ready file.
Read data from source table MBR_RDS_D
Write MBR_RDS_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
